plugins.description: List of npm packages to install for offline plugin support

items.description:
npm package specifier. Supports:
- npm packages: package, package@version, package@latest
- scoped packages: @scope/package, @scope/package@version
- git URLs: package@git+https://..., package@git+ssh://...
- GitHub shorthand: github:user/repo, package@github:user/repo
